Spiky-haired mercenary. Wields a sword that is comically large and physically impossible to swing. Usually accompanied by a colorful cast of misfits to save the world from an eccentric villain with great hair. Chocobo riding license included.
Outlaw in a dying Wild West. Excellent at robbing trains, fishing, and trying to be a good man while my gang leader constantly insists he 'has a plan'. I just need more money and some faith.
Outcast turned savior. Master archer who hunts robotic dinosaurs using a futuristic earpiece. Great at overriding giant mechanical beasts and saving a post-apocalyptic primitive world.

Charming treasure hunter. I travel the globe discovering lost cities, only to completely destroy them during a massive gunfight while escaping. Half my time is spent climbing suspiciously convenient yellow ledges.
Plane crash survivor. Good at dual-wielding firearms and genetic superpowers injected from questionable syringes. Familiar with underwater objectivist utopias gone terribly wrong. 'Would you kindly?'
2D Explorer and crafter. Started with copper tools, now fighting eldritch horror bosses in space. Frequently dealing with slime rain, goblin armies, and digging straight down to the underworld.

Corporate runaway turned farmer. Inherited a rundown plot of land. I spend my days watering parsnips, giving mayonnaise to villagers so they'll marry me, and exploring a dangerous mine. In bed exactly by 2 AM.
Apocalypse survivor. Excellent at screaming 'PILLS HERE!' and trying to get to a safe room while being chased by a horde of infected and a terrifying crying woman. Always startled the witch.
Special forces operative. Highly experienced in 360 no-scopes, screaming into a headset lobby, and pressing F to pay respects. 'Bravo Six, going dark.'
Light-wielding guardian. Raised from the dead by a floating geometric shape. I travel the solar system shooting aliens for a chance at slightly better colored pants (loot). Eyes up, Guardian.
Vault hunter on a desert planet. I use guns that shoot swords, explode when reloaded, or insult me. Accompanied by an extremely annoying one-wheeled robot who calls everyone 'minion'.
Azeroth adventurer. Spends hours grinding boars for a 1% drop rate item, raiding dungeons with 39 other screaming people, and complaining about the opposing faction. FOR THE HORDE/ALLIANCE!
Stressed engineer. Very good at cutting off the limbs of horrifying space mutants with mining tools. Strongly dislike air vents and flashing lights. Make us whole.
Fallen samurai. Forced to use dishonorable stealth tactics to repel a massive invasion on my home island. Excellent at composing haikus, petting foxes, and challenging enemies to dramatic standoffs.
Friendly neighborhood web-slinger. Excellent at swinging through New York, stopping street crimes, and taking selfies while diving off skyscrapers. Constant financial issues and poor time management.
